frontmatter.description: Postgres deadlock detected (sql_state 40P01) between concurrent transactions

body:
## When this fires
Postgres aborts a transaction with sql_state 40P01 because two transactions are waiting on each other's locks.

## Playbook
1. Pull the deadlock-graph to see which two statements were involved.
2. Inspect recent-deploys-db for new queries or migrations that changed lock ordering.
3. Search tickets-similar-deadlocks for prior fixes (typically: enforce a canonical lock order or shrink the transaction scope).
